title: obione repens
intro: Obione repens, also known as creeping sea spurry, is a low-growing, prostrate annual or perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Obione repens may include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Obione repens can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and minor injuries.
